features.name: class property accessed through explicit this for nested object
features.description: Code should include a class with an object property accessed via explicit this prefix in a task method

features.name: class property accessed without explicit this for nested object
features.description: Code should include a class with an object property accessed without this prefix in a task method

features.name: class array property accessed through explicit this
features.description: Code should include a class with an array property accessed via explicit this prefix with index in a task method

features.name: class array property accessed without explicit this
features.description: Code should include a class with an array property accessed without this prefix with index in a task method

features.name: local variable shadowing class property in task
features.description: Code should include a class with an int property shadowed by a local variable in a task method, with display of the local variable

features.name: package scope resolution with double_colon
features.description: Code should include a package and class both having a variable with the same name, where package scope is used in the class method
